micrograd.description: Tiny Autograd engine implementing backpropagation over dynamically built DAG. ~100 lines engine + ~50 lines neural net library. PyTorch-like API. Scalar-valued operations only.

nanoGPT.description: Simplest, fastest repo for training/finetuning medium GPTs. train.py ~300 lines, model.py ~300 lines. Reproduces GPT-2 (124M) on OpenWebText on 8xA100 in ~4 days.

minbpe.description: Minimal byte-level BPE tokenizer. BasicTokenizer, RegexTokenizer (GPT-2 style), GPT4Tokenizer. Train/encode/decode. Feature parity with tiktoken.

llm.c.description: LLM training in pure C/CUDA. No PyTorch needed. Reproduces GPT-2/GPT-3. ~7% faster than PyTorch. Reference CPU fp32 impl in ~1000 lines.

makemore.description: Autoregressive character-level language model. Implements bigrams, MLP, CNN, RNN, LSTM, GRU, Transformer. Educational, single hackable file.
